posts.title: MIT 6.005 Reading 4 Code Review
posts.text: Reading 4: Code ReviewCode review really has two purposes: Improving the code. Finding bugs, anticipating possible bugs, checking the clarity of the code, and checking for consistency with the project’s style standards. Improving the programmer. Code review is an important way that programmers learn and teach each other, about new language features, changes in the design of the project or its coding standards, and new techniques. In open source projects, particularly, much conversation happens in the context of code reviews. Avoid Magic Number可译为幻数, 编程时我们只能接受代码中出现0, 1, 最多2, 而不接受其他突兀的数字。 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526public static int dayOfYear(int month, int dayOfMonth, int year) { if (month == 2) { dayOfMonth += 31; } else if (month == 3) { dayOfMonth += 59; } else if (month == 4) { dayOfMonth += 90; } else if (month == 5) { dayOfMonth += 31 + 28 + 31 + 30; } else if (month == 6) { dayOfMonth += 31 + 28 + 31 + 30 + 31; } else if (month == 7) { dayOfMonth += 31 + 28 + 31 + 30 + 31 + 30; } else if (month == 8) { dayOfMonth += 31 + 28 + 31 + 30 + 31 + 30 + 31; } else if (month == 9) { dayOfMonth += 31 + 28 + 31 + 30 + 31 + 30 + 31 + 31; } else if (month == 10) { dayOfMonth += 31 + 28 + 31 + 30 + 31 + 30 + 31 + 31 + 30; } else if (month == 11) { dayOfMonth += 31 + 28 + 31 + 30 + 31 + 30 + 31 + 31 + 30 + 31; } else if (month == 12) { dayOfMonth += 31 + 28 + 31 + 30 + 31 + 30 + 31 + 31 + 30 + 31 + 31; } return dayOfMonth;} 以上代码就存在很多幻数，解决办法： 1.可以用FEBRUARY , …, DECEMBER来代替2…12。还可以使用枚举类。 1234public enum Month { JANUARY, FEBRUARY, MARCH, APRIL, MAY, JUNE, JULY, AUGUST, SEPTEMBER, OCTOBER, NOVEMBER, DECEMBER} 2.可以创建一个dayOfMonth数组来存储每个月的天数。也可以继续利用枚举类来完成。 1234567891011121314public enum Month { JANUARY(31), FEBRUARY(28), MARCH(31), APRIL(30), MAY(31), JUNE(30), JULY(31), AUGUST(31), SEPTEMBER(30), OCTOBER(31), NOVEMBER(30), DECEMBER(31); private final int days; Month(int days) { this.days = days; } public int getDays() { return days; }} 这里Month是枚举类的构造函数，所以可以在声明枚举类的时候直接给每个月份附带上天数 Month(Num) 月份枚举-参考网页 One Purpose For Each Variable
